title: SEM Microscopy
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for realistic scanning electron microscope image plates with scientific texture, grayscale or false-color rendering, and structured instrument-layout cues.

en.title: SEM Microscopy
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for realistic scanning electron microscope image plates with scientific texture, grayscale or false-color rendering, and structured instrument-layout cues.

zh-CN.title: SEM 电子显微镜显微摄影
zh-CN.description: 测试真实扫描电镜质感、灰阶或假彩色显微摄影、比例尺区域和仪器信息栏式结构化版式。
